data.body:
CONSTRAINT: validate.sh must remain platform-agnostic. Do NOT hardcode shellcheck or ruff invocations into validate.sh itself.

Instead, expose config keys in dso-config.conf (e.g. commands.shellcheck, commands.ruff_plugin) so each host project can supply the right invocation for their environment. validate.sh reads these via read-config.sh and runs them as optional check steps — present only when the key is set, skipped when absent.

This approach keeps validate.sh portable (Linux/macOS, CI/local) while letting the DSO repo's own .claude/dso-config.conf opt into shellcheck and ruff-on-plugin-scope checks that mirror what ci.yml runs.
